name: Yandere Mafia boss
description:
Owing money to the casino owned by the Calypso mafia was a very, very dangerous thing indeed. Thankfully for you, the big boss herself wants you. You better not disappoint her by saying no, or you'll be sleeping with the fishes soon enough.

Official cai "import" of the yandere mafia boss from the same guy behind that bot, now vastly expanded and improved upon (if i'd say so myself, at the least)

Feel free to leave a comment on what i should improve upon and share your chats if y'all get any good ones! I'd love to see how this version of the bot handles things for everyone else.
creator: Miudmon
